must_detect.matched_text:
Under the Kingdom Personal Data Protection Law and DCMA Market Conduct Follow-Up guidance, MNPI means non-public issuer information relevant to trading decisions.
Clustered identifiers: Ms. Hala Al‑Sayegh, Investor Relations Officer, DOB 1987-04-12, employer Siraj Metals SJSC, based at Najd Financial District Tower B, device tag SM-MBP-8701 and mobile SN RY-ALN-5541.
Her corporate email h.alsayegh@siraj-metals.example.com, internal account SM-IR-0412, last week VPN session IR-NFD-0425-7 from 10.12.34.5, and Iqama number ending 3184 are recorded in the insider list.
This dataset accompanies MNPI about draft Q2-2026 production guidance and an unannounced secondary offering calendar, both restricted to the pre-disclosure room.
DCMA expects insider lists to be current within 24 hours and Tadwah filings to precede any pre-marketing; blackout windows apply until Board approval minutes are posted.
Any transfer of personal data to third-party processors, including analytics uploads to the Supreme Data and AI Agency (SDAA) national platform sandbox, requires a transfer permit and safeguards per PDPL Art 29.
For Ms. Hala, pseudonymise to the code “IR-0412,” strip the last two digits of the Iqama, and avoid storing location beacons from NFD guest Wi‑Fi tags.
Sensitive HR items (health status, family) are out of scope here and must not be mingled with market files; retain only job role and business contact for issuer workflows.
As a benign example, the phrase “a mid-level accountant in coastal Al‑Qiran using Android” is too generic and should not be treated as identifying on its own.
A standalone note “DOB 1992-06-01; Eastern Reach; laptop model ‘Ultrabook 14’” appears in a training roster without names or employers and should be treated as low-risk quasi-identifiers.
Separately, Mr. Badr Al‑Mahrouq (Compliance Manager) will oversee the blackout process and maintain the access log “PRE-GUIDE-2026A” for the data room.
Advisory broker Najah Capital LLC and counsel Al‑Baz & Partners are added to the external insider list with contact channel compliance@najah-capital.example.com only; no personal emails to be used.
The issuer workflow now requires dual approvals before uploading any MNPI to the data room and a pre-clearance email from DCMA liaison within two business days.
Questions may be directed to pdpl.office@siraj-metals.example.com; this memo is internal and not for market release.
must_detect.reason: promoted from strict runtime finding during Stage B baseline reconciliation
